case_title: OLISAEMEKA EZE VS. THE GOLF WAREHOUSE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RECEIVED VIA US MAIL (PLAINTIFF CC'D) REGARDING THE FORWARDING OF ANY FUTURE CORRESPONDENCE REGARDING THIS SMALL CLAIMS MATTER TO A DIFFERENT ADDRESS THAN WHAT WAS FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF.
